title: Device for dispensing sterile on-demand, heated towelettes
abstract: A wet towelette dispensing device is provided. The device is operable in conjunction with a container storing a plurality of dried, compressed, individually wrapped, preferably sealed towelettes. The device includes a pump configured to transfer a predetermined amount of liquid from a liquid reservoir to a heat exchanger to heat the liquid to a predetermined temperature, a plunger configured to release a first one of the towelettes from its individual wrapping. The device further includes a liquid dispense unit configured to deliver the heated liquid to the released towelette.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A wet towelette dispensing device, operable in conjunction with a container storing a plurality of dried, compressed, individually wrapped towelettes, the device comprising: a pump configured to transfer a predetermined amount of liquid from a liquid reservoir to a heat exchanger to heat the liquid to a predetermined temperature; a plunger configured to release a first one of the towelettes from its individual wrapping; and a liquid dispense unit configured to deliver the heated liquid to the released towelette. 2. The device of claim 1, wherein the plunger is configured to move at least two of the plurality of dried, compressed towelettes at a time. 3. The device of claim 2, wherein the liquid dispenser is configured to simultaneously deliver the heated liquid to at least two of the plurality of dried, compressed towelettes. 4. The device of claim 3, wherein the at least two of the plurality of dried, compressed towelettes stay separate during and after the heated liquid is dispensed to the towelettes. 5. The device of claim 1, further comprising a sensor coupled with the pump, wherein the sensor automatically determines the predetermined amount of liquid. 6. The device of claim 5, wherein the sensor is configured to detect at least one of the following: weight of the dried, compressed towelette, numbers of the dried, compressed towelettes, dryness of the dried, compressed towelette. 7. The device of claim 1, further comprising a select switch, wherein the select switch allows a user to select at least one of the following: number of the towelettes to be dispensed at a time, a size of the towelette, an amount of the heated liquid. 8. The device of claim 1, wherein the liquid is heated in the heat exchanger to at least 165 Â°F. 9. The device of claim 1, further comprising a tray configured to receive the released towelette, wherein the tray moves outwardly from a body of the device such that the released towelette can be picked up at the outside of the body of the device. 10. The device of claim 9, wherein the tray retracts once the released towelette is removed from the tray. 11. The device of claim 9, wherein the tray retracts into the body of the device after a predetermined time. 12. The device of claim 1, further comprising a tray coupled with a plunging rod, the tray configured to receive the released towelette, wherein the rod extends and moves the released towelette on the tray toward the outside of a body of the device such that the released towelette can be picked up at the outside of the body of the device. 13. The device of claim 12, wherein the plunging rod retracts when the released towelette reaches a predetermined area on the tray. 14. The device of claim 1, wherein the container is a rotating cartridge having a plurality of slots, each of the plurality of slots is configured to retain at least one towelette. 15. The device of claim 1, wherein the plunger is coupled with a cutting mechanism.
